allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const names = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''adobe''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''after''\)\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const names = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''adobe''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''photoshop''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''illustr''\)\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const names = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''visual''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''vscode''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''cursor''\)\); console.log\(names.join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const check = [''SiReact'',''SiNextdotjs'',''SiTypescript'',''SiTailwindcss'',''SiFigma'',''SiFramer'',''SiVercel'',''SiGit'',''SiGithub'',''SiNodedotjs'',''SiPostgresql'',''SiPrisma'',''SiStripe'',''SiSupabase'',''SiBlender'',''SiNotion'']; check.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, !!si[n]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); [''SiReact'',''SiNextdotjs'',''SiTypescript'',''SiTailwindcss'',''SiFigma'',''SiFramer'',''SiVercel'',''SiGit'',''SiGithub'',''SiNodedotjs'',''SiPostgresql'',''SiPrisma'',''SiStripe'',''SiSupabase'',''SiBlender'',''SiNotion''].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, n in si\)\)")
